summary: The video shows a highway scene with multiple vehicles traveling in both directions under overcast skies. A red sedan overtakes a green truck from the left side of the road, while other cars move steadily in their respective lanes.

events_timeline.event: A red sedan overtakes a green truck from the left side of the road.
